body: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi's ownership in PT MD Entertainment Tbk (MDEN) decreased by 4.9% following a share sale transaction, reducing his stake to 11.92% of the company's issued fully paid capital, with a total transaction value of IDR 1.26 trillion. The company's stock price has risen 4.91% to IDR 3,630 per share, with a total of 484.99 million shares sold at IDR 2,600 per share.
title: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi's stake in PT MD Entertainment decreases by 4.9% following share sale transaction.

body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) has established a new subsidiary, PT Pahala Globalindo Energi, to enter the fuel trading sector, aiming to support future revenue growth, with a total acquisition value of IDR 7.2 billion. In Q3 2024, INDY's revenue dropped 22.4% to USD 1.78 billion, with coal commodities contributing 87% and non-coal businesses accounting for 13% of the company's revenue.
title: Indika Energy expands business portfolio by entering fuel trading sector through new subsidiary.

body: On Monday, domestic investors in the Indonesia Stock Exchange accounted for 92% of the total transaction value, with a net sell of IDR 296 billion, while foreign investors recorded a net sell of IDR 296.35 billion. In comparison, during the previous trading week, domestic investors accounted for 58% and foreign investors for 42% of the total transaction value, with domestic investors recording a net sell of IDR 1.07 trillion and foreign investors posting a net buy of IDR 1.07 trillion.
title: Domestic investors dominate Indonesia Stock Exchange transactions on Monday, accounting for 92% of total transaction value.

body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) is undertaking a rights issue to raise IDR 1.49 trillion, with 95% of the proceeds to be allocated to capital injection into PT Mahkota Sentosa Utama, the developer of the Meikarta project, and the remaining 5% for working capital. The company's principal shareholder, PT Kemuning Satiatama, has committed to participating in the rights issue, pledging funds worth IDR 1.2 trillion, and LPCK's shares rose 0.83% to IDR 605 per share on Monday.
title: Lippo Cikarang to Raise IDR 1.49 Trillion Through Rights Issue to Fund Meikarta Project

body: The Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index rose 0.74% or 54.9 points to 7,437.73, driven by strong performances from shares of PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI), and PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia Tbk, with a total transaction value of IDR 44.93 trillion (USD 2.83 billion). Meanwhile, shares of Barito Group issuers, including PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk, PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk, PT Barito Pacific Tbk, and PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk, were among the top laggards, weighing down the index's performance.
title: Jakarta Composite Index Rises 0.74% on Strong Performance from Most Sectors

body: PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR) surged 24% to IDR 366 per share, leading the top gainers at the Indonesia Stock Exchange, driven by a 226.16% year-on-year profit increase to IDR 155.34 billion in Q3 2024. The company's gross profit also rose 45.28% year-on-year to IDR 301.31 billion, despite a 17.5% revenue decline to IDR 2.63 trillion, with foreign investors buying 113,000 shares, net.
title: Jhonlin Agro Raya's stock surges 24% to top gainers list at Indonesia Stock Exchange.

body: PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) revised its 2024 coal production target to 76-78 million tons, down from 78-82 million tons, due to weather challenges and low market demand, resulting in a 2% year-over-year increase in coal production volume to 57.3 million tons as of September 30, 2024. Despite a 21.1% year-over-year decline in revenue to USD 926.88 million, the company's net profit surged 110.3% year-over-year to USD 122.86 million, but its stock price fell 6.12% to IDR 138 per share, prompting extensive offloading by foreign investors.
title: Bumi Resources revises down 2024 coal production target to 76-78 million tons due to weather challenges and low market demand.

body: PT Hero Supermarket Tbk (HRN) has officially changed its name to PT DFI Retail Nusantara Tbk after 92.28% of shareholders voted in favor of the change, following the divestment of its supermarket business line to PT Hero Retail Nusantara for IDR 183 billion. The company will now focus on its retail business, including Guardian and IKEA, after terminating its Giant supermarket line and divesting its Hero supermarket business.
title: PT Hero Supermarket Tbk Changes Name to PT DFI Retail Nusantara Tbk Following Shareholders' Approval

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index rose 3.77% or 268.51 points to 7,382.78 last week, driven by an 8.66% increase in daily transaction frequency to 1.24 million, with foreign investors contributing 42% of the total transaction value of IDR 53.6 trillion. PT Barito Renewables Energy TBK (none) led the top gainers with a 283% increase, while PT Bank Negara Indonesia TBK (BBNI) led the top losers with a 2.41% decline.
title: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index Rises 3.77% Amid Increased Daily Transaction Frequency

body: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur TBK (BIPi) recorded a net foreign buy of IDR 100.14 million, the highest among issuers, with foreign investors buying 151.94 million shares and selling 51.80 million shares. Despite closing lower at IDR 88, BIPi's share price has strengthened 12.8% over the past five days, outperforming other top net foreign shares, including PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia TBK (GOTO), PT Surya Citra Media TBK, PT Sentul City TBK, and PT Wulandari Bangun Laksana TBK.
title: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Posts Highest Net Foreign Buy of 100.14 Million Shares on Friday.
